title: ImagerySource
description: An imagery source definition (satellite, aerial, map overlay, etc). Property definitions track the editor-layer-index schema closely, since ELI is the upstream source for most imagery entries.

id.description: A unique identifier for the source; used in imagery_used changeset tag.

name.description: The name of the imagery source.

description.description: A short English-language description of the source.

template.description: A URL template for fetching imagery tiles. May be encrypted.

encrypted.description: Whether the template is encrypted (contains an API key).

default.description: Whether this imagery should be shown in the default world-wide menu.

best.description: Whether this imagery is the best source for the region.

i18n.description: Whether the imagery name should be translated.

overlay.description: True if tiles are transparent and can be overlaid on another source.

category.description: A rough categorisation of different types of imagery layers.

tileSize.description: Size of individual tiles delivered by a TMS service.

zoomExtent.description: Min and max zoom levels [min, max].

zoomRange.description: Number of additional zoom levels beyond native.

feature.description: GeoJSON Feature defining the coverage area.

icon.description: A URL for an image, that can be displayed in the list of imagery layers next to the name.

terms_html.description: HTML attribution text for the imagery source.

terms_text.description: Plain text attribution for the imagery source.

terms_url.description: URL to the terms of use or attribution page.

privacy_policy_url.description: A URL for the privacy policy of the operator, or false if no privacy policy exists.

permission_osm.description: Explicit/implicit permission by the owner for use in OSM.

license_url.description: A URL for the license or permissions for the imagery.

startDate.description: The age of the oldest imagery or data in the source, as an RFC 3339 date or leading portion of one.

endDate.description: The age of the newest imagery or data in the source, as an RFC 3339 date or leading portion of one.

nameStringID.description: Localization string ID for the name.

descriptionStringID.description: Localization string ID for the description.
